Context Example

{
"DBotScore"
:

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the file. File.SHA1 The SHA1 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: The vendor that reported the file as malicious. File.Malicious.Description A description explaining why the file was determined to be malicious.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The SHA1 hash of the file. ThreatCrowd.File.references The refernces related to the file.
outputs.name: ThreatCrowd.File.sha1

outputs.description: The link to the file in the product. ThreatCrowd.File.ips The ips related to the file.
outputs.name: ThreatCrowd.File.permalink

outputs.description: The domains related to the file. ThreatCrowd.File.value The file identifier.
outputs.name: ThreatCrowd.File.domains

outputs.description: The scans related to thefile. ThreatCrowd.File.md5 The MD5 of the file.
outputs.name: ThreatCrowd.File.scans

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score. DBotScore.Score The actual score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: Reliability of the source providing the intelligence data.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Reliability
